text: 2021 Top 10: A01 Broken Access Control, A02 Cryptographic Failures, A03 Injection, A04 Insecure Design, A05 Security Misconfiguration, A06 Vulnerable Components, A07 Auth Failures, A08 Software Integrity Failures, A09 Logging/Monitoring Failures, A10 SSRF
The OWASP Top 10 is the de facto standard for web application security awareness, listing the ten most critical security risks
The 2021 edition shifted from vulnerability categories to risk-based categories
